data.title: Hays plc Executives Sell Shares Following Performance Awards
data.description:
The latest announcement is out from Hays plc ( (GB:HAS) ).

Hays plc has announced the sale of ordinary shares by several members of its executive leadership team, including CEO Dirk Hahn, following the release of awards granted under the Performance Share Plan. These transactions, conducted on the London Stock Exchange, involve the sale of a total of 151,020 shares at a price of £0.575138 each. This move may reflect personal financial decisions by the executives and could have implications for the company’s stock market perception and stakeholder confidence.

The most recent analyst rating on (GB:HAS) stock is a Hold with a £56.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Hays plc stock, see the GB:HAS Stock Forecast page.

To see Spark’s full report on GB:HAS stock, click here.

data.title: Ramaco Resources Expands Brook Mine Project Capacity
data.description:
An announcement from Ramaco Resources ( (METC) ) is now available.

On September 18, 2025, Ramaco Resources announced significant developments in its Brook Mine project, including the groundbreaking of the mine and plans to increase production capacity from 2 million to 5 million tons per year. The company has raised $200 million in new equity and is engaging with federal agencies to expand its mining permit and enhance its processing capacity. These efforts aim to position Ramaco as a dominant domestic producer of rare earth elements and critical minerals, reducing reliance on foreign sources and aligning with national security priorities.

The most recent analyst rating on (METC) stock is a Hold with a $31.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Ramaco Resources stock, see the METC Stock Forecast page.

The company’s strategic initiatives and operational advancements provide a positive outlook, but financial challenges need to be addressed to improve overall valuation.

To see Spark’s full report on METC stock, click here.

More about Ramaco Resources

Ramaco Resources, Inc. operates in the mining industry, focusing on rare earth elements and critical minerals. The company is engaged in the expansion of its Brook Mine project, which is positioned as the first new rare earth mine in the United States in 70 years, with a focus on becoming a dual platform critical minerals company.

data.title: Electra Battery Materials Announces Major Restructuring to Reduce Debt
data.description:
Electra Battery Materials Corp ( (TSE:ELBM) ) just unveiled an update.

On September 16 and 17, 2025, Electra Battery Materials Corporation announced amendments to its recapitalization and restructuring initiative. The company plans to convert approximately US$41.3 million of outstanding secured convertible notes into equity, reducing its debt significantly. This restructuring involves issuing 55 million units, each comprising one common share and one warrant, to be exchanged for 60% of the company’s convertible debt. The remaining debt will be converted into a new three-year term loan, with additional common shares issued as a bonus to lenders. The restructuring is subject to shareholder and regulatory approvals, and aims to strengthen Electra’s capital structure and support its strategic growth plans.

The most recent analyst rating on (TSE:ELBM) stock is a Buy with a C$2.20 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Electra Battery Materials Corp stock, see the TSE:ELBM Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on TSE:ELBM Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, TSE:ELBM is a Underperform.

Electra Battery Materials Corp’s overall stock score is low due to its severe financial difficulties, including no revenue and high losses, and negative valuation metrics. While technical analysis indicates a bearish trend, recent corporate events show potential for future growth, but they are insufficient to offset current financial and operational challenges.

To see Spark’s full report on TSE:ELBM stock, click here.

More about Electra Battery Materials Corp

Electra Battery Materials Corporation is a company operating in the battery materials industry. It focuses on providing materials essential for battery production, with a strategic emphasis on reshoring North America’s battery materials supply chain. The company is also involved in nickel refining and battery recycling.

data.title: Surge Battery Metals Launches $5M Private Placement to Boost Lithium Project
data.description:
Surge Exploration Inc ( (TSE:NILI) ) has provided an announcement.

Surge Battery Metals Inc. has announced a non-brokered private placement of units, aiming to raise between $4 million and $5 million. This financing is intended to support the company’s joint venture with Evolution Mining Limited on the Nevada North Lithium Project. The proceeds will help Surge meet funding commitments, advance exploration, and strengthen its balance sheet, enhancing its operational flexibility and industry positioning.

data.title: CSSC (Hong Kong) Shipping Announces Changes to Interim Dividend Dates
data.description:
CSSC (Hong Kong) Shipping Company Limited ( (HK:3877) ) has provided an announcement.

CSSC (Hong Kong) Shipping Company Limited has announced changes to the book closure dates, record date, and payment date for its Interim Dividend. The revised dates are now set from October 2 to October 6, 2025, with the dividend payment scheduled for November 13, 2025. Shareholders have the option to receive the dividend in either Hong Kong Dollars or Renminbi, with the latter calculated based on the average RMB to HKD central parity rate. This announcement impacts shareholders’ planning and the company’s dividend distribution process.

The most recent analyst rating on (HK:3877) stock is a Hold with a HK$2.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on CSSC (Hong Kong) Shipping Company Limited stock, see the HK:3877 Stock Forecast page.

More about CSSC (Hong Kong) Shipping Company Limited

CSSC (Hong Kong) Shipping Company Limited operates in the shipping and maritime industry, providing shipping leasing services. The company focuses on leasing vessels and related maritime equipment, catering to the needs of the shipping industry.

Average Trading Volume: 21,775,524

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: HK$11.78B

data.description:

Sareum Holdings plc announced the exercise of warrants to subscribe for 825,000 new ordinary shares, raising £103,125. data.title: Resurs Holding Announces Board Changes and Remuneration Decisions
data.description:
Resurs Holding AB ( (SE:RESURS) ) has issued an announcement.

Resurs Holding AB held an Extraordinary General Meeting where it was resolved to elect Steve Krieger as a new Board member, replacing Peter, while maintaining the Board’s size at eight members. The meeting also decided that remuneration for Board and committee work would remain unchanged, with no remuneration for certain Board members until the next Annual General Meeting.

The most recent analyst rating on (SE:RESURS) stock is a Hold with a SEK29.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Resurs Holding AB stock, see the SE:RESURS Stock Forecast page.

More about Resurs Holding AB

Resurs Holding, operating through its subsidiary Resurs Bank, is a leader in retail finance across the Nordic region, providing payment solutions, consumer loans, and niche insurance products. Established in 1977, it has become a key partner for retail and e-commerce payment and loyalty solutions, serving approximately six million private customers in Sweden, Denmark, Norway, and Finland. The company is listed on Nasdaq Stockholm and operates under the supervision of Finansinspektionen.

Average Trading Volume: 21,611

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: SEK5.42B

data.title: Park Ha Biological Technology Announces 2025 AGM with Key Share Structure Proposals
data.description:
Park Ha Biological Technology Co., Ltd. ( (PHH) ) has provided an announcement.

On September 12, 2025, Park Ha Biological Technology Co., Ltd. announced its upcoming 2025 Annual General Meeting, scheduled for October 3, 2025. Key proposals include increasing the company’s share capital, introducing a dual-class share structure, and approving a share consolidation. The meeting will also address the appointment of WWC P.C. as the independent auditor for the fiscal year ending October 31, 2025. These changes aim to enhance the company’s capital structure and governance, potentially impacting shareholder voting power and market positioning.

More about Park Ha Biological Technology Co., Ltd.

Park Ha Biological Technology Co., Ltd., incorporated in the Cayman Islands and listed on NASDAQ under the symbol PHH, operates within the biological technology industry. The company is based in Wuxi, Jiangsu Province, China, and focuses on life sciences innovation.

Average Trading Volume: 1,831,496

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Sell

data.description:

data.title: Copper Fox Metals Unveils New Copper Target at Mineral Mountain
data.description:
Copper Fox Metals ( (TSE:CUU) ) has issued an update.

Copper Fox Metals has identified a new porphyry copper target at its Mineral Mountain project in Arizona, expanding the potential of the district. The discovery includes a large area of copper and molybdenum mineralization, enhancing the project’s prospects and positioning it as a significant player in the porphyry copper industry. The company plans further exploration activities such as mapping, geochemistry, and petrographic studies to evaluate the target’s potential.

The most recent analyst rating on (TSE:CUU) stock is a Buy with a C$0.50 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Copper Fox Metals stock, see the TSE:CUU Stock Forecast page.
